display.purpose: Hero headline only. One per page. 800 weight, tight tracking.

headline.purpose: Section titles. Two to three per full page scroll maximum.

title.purpose: Component headers, modal titles, group labels.

body.purpose: All running text in the catalog, product descriptions, filter labels.

label.purpose: Badges, line codes, status labels. Only uppercase-tracked type in the system.

mono.purpose: SKUs, part numbers, refrigerant codes. Data identifiers only.

shadows.name: surface-hover
shadows.purpose: Product cards and interactive tiles on hover only. Invisible at rest.

shadows.name: action-emphasis
shadows.purpose: Hero search bar and primary CTA. The one shadow allowed at rest — marks the primary action zone.

shadows.name: overlay-separation
shadows.purpose: Cart drawer, auth modal. Clear layer separation from content beneath.

shadows.name: sticky-header
shadows.purpose: Navbar on scroll. Minimal stickiness cue.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for color/background transitions (button hover, badge state).

motion.name: ease-out-cubic
motion.purpose: Card lift and translate transitions. Feels snappy and direct.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Default action button. Blueprint Indigo fill. Used for search submit, catalog actions, navbar CTAs.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-primary"><svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="11" cy="11" r="8"/><path d="m21 21-4.35-4.35"/></svg>Buscar</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1d4ed8; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 16px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 20px; border: none; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #1e40af; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3b82f6; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-primary:disabled { background: #e2e8f0; color: #94a3b8; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: CTA Button
components.description: Purchase/conversion CTA. Thermal Orange. One per screen. Used for Add to Cart and primary hero actions.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-cta"><svg width="13" height="13" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2.5" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><circle cx="8" cy="21" r="1"/><circle cx="19" cy="21" r="1"/><path d="M2.05 2.05h2l2.66 12.42a2 2 0 0 0 2 1.58h9.78a2 2 0 0 0 1.95-1.57l1.65-7.43H5.12"/></svg>Agregar</button>
components.css: .ds-btn-cta { background: #f97316; color: #ffffff; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 20px; border: none; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; transition: background-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.4, 0, 0.2, 1); white-space: nowrap; } .ds-btn-cta:hover { background: #ea580c; } .ds-btn-cta:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #f97316; outline-offset: 2px; } .ds-btn-cta:disabled { background: #e2e8f0; color: #94a3b8; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Search Input
components.description: Main catalog search field. Slate-50 at rest, white on focus. Blueprint Indigo focus ring. Attached submit button.
components.css: .ds-search-field { display: flex; align-items: center; background: #f8fafc; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 8px; transition: border-color 150ms ease, background-color 150ms ease, box-shadow 150ms ease; } .ds-search-field:focus-within { border-color: #3b82f6; background: #ffffff; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(59, 130, 246, 0.15); } .ds-search-field__icon { flex-shrink: 0; margin-left: 14px; color: #94a3b8; } .ds-search-field__input { flex: 1; min-width: 0; background: transparent; border: none; padding: 10px 12px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 14px; color: #0f172a; outline: none; } .ds-search-field__input::placeholder { color: #94a3b8; } .ds-search-field__submit { flex-shrink: 0; margin: 6px; background: #1d4ed8; color: #ffffff; border: none; border-radius: 6px; padding: 6px 14px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; cursor: pointer; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-search-field__submit:hover { background: #1e40af; }

components.name: Product Card
components.description: Core catalog unit. Image zone → brand/line meta → name/SKU/refrigerants → stock/price/action. Flat at rest, lifted on hover.
components.html:
TECUMSEHCMP

Compresor Hermético 1HP R-22

SKU: TCH-AJ2432EX

R-22R-502
24 en stock

$1.850.000

COP · IVA incluido
components.css: .ds-product-card { background: #ffffff; border: 1px solid #e2e8f0; border-radius: 16px; overflow: hidden; display: flex; flex-direction: column; transition: border-color 200ms ease, box-shadow 200ms ease, transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.33, 1, 0.68, 1); } .ds-product-card:hover { border-color: #bfdbfe; box-shadow: 0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.08), 0 1px 4px rgba(0,0,0,0.06); transform: translateY(-2px); } .ds-product-card__image { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; height: 192px; background: #ffffff; border-bottom: 1px solid #f1f5f9; } .ds-product-card__body { padding: 14px 16px 16px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; flex: 1; } .ds-product-card__meta { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-product-card__brand { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 700; color: #1d4ed8; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.05em; } .ds-product-card__name { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 600; color: #0f172a; line-height: 1.4; display: -webkit-box; -webkit-line-clamp: 2; -webkit-box-orient: vertical; overflow: hidden; } .ds-product-card__sku { font-family: ui-monospace, 'Cascadia Code', Menlo, Consolas, monospace; font-size: 11px; color: #94a3b8; } .ds-product-card__tags { display: flex; flex-wrap: wrap; gap: 4px; } .ds-product-card__stock { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-product-card__footer { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; padding-top: 10px; border-top: 1px solid #f1f5f9; margin-top: 4px; } .ds-product-card__price { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 19px; font-weight: 800; color: #0f172a; line-height: 1.2; } .ds-product-card__currency { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; color: #94a3b8; } .ds-stock-dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-stock-dot--ok { background: #10b981; } .ds-stock-dot--low { background: #f59e0b; } .ds-stock-label--ok { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #059669; } .ds-stock-label--low { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #b45309; } .ds-badge-slate { background: #f1f5f9; color: #334155; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; } .ds-badge-sku { background: #f0fdfa; color: #0f766e; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; padding: 2px 5px; border-radius: 3px; } .ds-btn-cta { background: #f97316; color: #ffffff; padding: 7px 11px; border-radius: 7px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 600; border: none; cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 5px; transition: background-color 150ms ease; } .ds-btn-cta:hover { background: #ea580c; }

components.name: App Badge — Line Code
components.description: Product line classification chip. Slate variant for line codes (CMP, VAL, REF). Orange variant for NUEVO / low-stock alerts.
components.css: .ds-badge-slate { background: #f1f5f9; color: #334155; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block; } .ds-badge-orange { background: #fff7ed; color: #c2410c; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; padding: 2px 6px; border-radius: 4px; display: inline-block; } .ds-badge-sku { background: #f0fdfa; color: #0f766e; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 500; padding: 2px 5px; border-radius: 3px; display: inline-block; }

components.name: Category Nav Item
components.description: Dark-bar product line navigation. Always visible. Horizontally scrollable on mobile.
components.html: CompresoresVálvulasRefrigerantes
components.css: .ds-cat-nav { background: #0f172a; display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 2px; padding: 0 12px; overflow-x: auto; scrollbar-width: none; } .ds-cat-nav::-webkit-scrollbar { display: none; } .ds-cat-nav__item { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; padding: 10px 10px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: #cbd5e1; border-radius: 6px; text-decoration: none; white-space: nowrap; transition: color 150ms ease, background-color 150ms ease; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-cat-nav__item:hover { color: #ffffff; background: #1e293b; } .ds-cat-nav__item--active { color: #ffffff; background: #1e293b; }

components.name: Stock Status Indicator
components.description: Inline stock availability signal on product cards. Green dot for available, amber for low stock. Used only for stock context.
components.html:
24 en stock
Solo 3 en stock
components.css: .ds-stock { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 6px; } .ds-stock__dot { width: 6px; height: 6px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-stock__dot--ok { background: #10b981; } .ds-stock__dot--low { background: #f59e0b; } .ds-stock__label { font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; } .ds-stock__label--ok { color: #059669; } .ds-stock__label--low { color: #b45309; }

narrative.overview:
FSP Parts is built like a well-typeset industrial parts catalog. The interface is a reference tool first and a storefront never — every layout decision, typographic choice, and color assignment answers a question a HVAC/R technician might have while looking for a compressor under a tight deadline. Clarity, density, and unambiguous hierarchy are the design virtues. White space is earned by information, not given for aesthetic comfort.

The palette is anchored in two committed colors: Blueprint Indigo (#1d4ed8) for authoritative actions and navigation, and Thermal Orange (#f97316) for the singular purchase CTA. The background — Clean Field White (#f8fafc) — is deliberately low-noise, giving technical data (SKUs, specs, refrigerant codes) room to be read, not styled.

This system explicitly rejects the vocabulary of consumer retail. No impulse-buy urgency patterns, no promotional badge inflation, no hero sections that prioritize spectacle over the catalog. A technician arriving with a part number should feel they have reached a trusted supplier's reference shelf, not a flash-sale storefront.
keyCharacteristics: Catalog-first hierarchy: product data is the protagonist, not hero imagery
Density is a feature, not a bug — B2B users want specs, not padding
Technical vocabulary (SKUs, part codes, refrigerant identifiers) is treated as first-class typography with its own mono typeface
Actions are solid and direct; affordances are unambiguous and filled, never ghost-only
Color carries function — status, action, identity — never decoration

rules.name: The One CTA Rule
rules.body: Thermal Orange appears on one interactive element per screen: the primary purchase or search action. A second orange element anywhere on the screen dilutes the signal and starts to look like consumer retail.

rules.name: The Neutral Infrastructure Rule
rules.body: Every color token has a named functional role. Using any color for visual interest or variety is prohibited. If you cannot name the function, remove the color.

rules.name: The SKU-as-Data Rule
rules.body: Part numbers, SKUs, and refrigerant codes are rendered in the mono stack. They are identifiers — not prose, not decorative content. They do not get colored, italicized, or animated.

rules.name: The Eyebrow Prohibition
rules.body: Small all-caps kicker labels above section headings are a 2023-era SaaS scaffold. Remove existing instances. Section hierarchy is established through weight and size contrast alone.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: A component at rest is flat. A shadow means either this element has changed state or this layer is above content. Decorative shadows on static cards are prohibited.

dos: Do use Blueprint Indigo (#1d4ed8) as the default action color and Thermal Orange (#f97316) as the one purchase/conversion CTA per screen.
Do render SKUs, part numbers, and refrigerant codes in the mono stack.
Do use stock status colors (Stock Green, Stock Amber) only for stock indicators.
Do keep the category nav always visible as a horizontal scroll bar on mobile.
Do treat density as a feature: product grids can display more data than a consumer catalog.
Do use flat-at-rest, shadow-on-hover elevation on interactive surfaces.
Do keep section hierarchy from weight and size contrast — no uppercase eyebrow labels.
Do establish line hierarchy in the product card top-to-bottom: image → brand/line → name/SKU/refrigerants → stock/price/action.
donts: Don't use consumer / retail e-commerce patterns: sale badges, countdown timers, urgency overlays, flash-sale promotional banners.
Don't extend the generic blue-and-orange Tailwind SaaS palette further in its current default form.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). The .hvac-gradient animation in LandingView.vue is a current violation.
Don't use uppercase-tracked kicker labels above section headings. The current codebase uses these; remove existing instances.
Don't use border-left greater than 1px as a colored accent stripe on any component.
Don't hide or de-emphasize technical data. SKUs are not metadata to be grayed out.
Don't use opacity to represent the disabled state. Use the explicit disabled color pair: background #e2e8f0, color #94a3b8.
Don't add decorative shadows to cards at rest.
